articles.title: Brookline schools would see more than 200 layoffs if override fails, officials say
articles.description:
District leaders warn schools could become "unrecognizable" in three years if a funding measure isn't passed.

The post Brookline schools would see more than 200 layoffs if override fails, officials say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Brookline schools face over 200 layoffs if funding override fails.
District leaders warn schools could become 'unrecognizable' within three years.
Local students and families may experience significant educational disruptions.

articles.title: What to know about the PETS Act aimed at protecting dogs and cats in Mass.
articles.description:
Lawmakers say the proposal would reduce puppy mill sales while expanding protections for pets and their owners.

The post What to know about the PETS Act aimed at protecting dogs and cats in Mass. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Lawmakers propose the PETS Act to protect pets and reduce puppy mill sales in Massachusetts.
The act aims to expand protections for pets and their owners statewide.
Boston residents could see improved pet welfare and reduced unethical breeding practices.

articles.title: As snow melts, drought still a big issue for Mass.
articles.description:
State officials are urging water conservation amid persistent precipitation deficits despite heavy winter snowfall.

The post As snow melts, drought still a big issue for Mass. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: State officials urge Boston residents to conserve water amid ongoing drought conditions.
Massachusetts faces significant precipitation deficits despite heavy snowfall this winter.
Water conservation measures are critical for local communities facing potential water shortages.
